pre_downsample.comment: Optional pre-downsampling: trigger automatically above the threshold and randomly reduce to the threshold point count.

outlier_removal.comment: Outlier removal: remove only obvious floating points, cap removal at 1%, and use conservative R-OR and SOR settings.

z_up_alignment.comment: Z-up alignment: detect multiple planes and select the best floor candidate.

scale_adjustment.comment: Scale adjustment: map the reconstruction to the ScanNet scale distribution.

spacing_normalization.comment: Spacing normalization: combine the r^3 rule, perfect spacing sampling, and iterative refinement.

density_adjustment.comment: Density adjustment: correct only extreme density outliers within a +/-30% budget.

normal_estimation.comment: Normal estimation: KNN normals with chunked handling above one million points.
